arguments.javascript: const fs = require('fs'); fs.writeFileSync('s10_evidence.txt', 'Computer-Use Layer2b OK');

result_summary: Chromium's `execute_javascript` on Windows tried the bookmark-URL UIA bypass and the CDP fallback. The bookmark path failed (see debug logs); for the CDP path, relaunch the browser with `--remote-debugging-port=N` and export CUA_DRIVER_CDP_PORT=N before starting cua-driver. Alternatively, create a bookmark named `cua-driver-eval` (any URL — the driver overwrites it on first use) in the Favorites bar to enable the bookmark-URL bypass.  Or use `get_text` / `query_dom` for read-only access.
